### Post by Psuedo on 2010-05-23
HI..My dvd drive has stopped recognizing my dvd's a while back. And when checked my fstab ,this is what i get.

# /etc/fstab: static file system information.
#
#  -- This file has been automaticly generated by ntfs-config -- 
#
# <file system> <mount point>   <type>  <options>       <dump>  <pass>

proc /proc proc defaults 0 0
# Entry for /dev/sda3 :
UUID=980dccb7-d0f1-42e0-93b9-5f9562916eab / ext4 errors=remount-ro 0 1

Please help me out make my dvd's recognizable.
